zh.lifeSummary: 當Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne於1261年7月25日出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯時，他的父親John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne22歲，母親Béatrice of England19歲。他於1294年5月與Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort在蘇格蘭洛包爾德包結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1312年8月27日在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉拉 洛奇享年51歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼莫比韓瓦斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne于1261年7月25日出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯时，他的父亲John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne22岁，母亲Béatrice of England19岁。他于1294年5月与Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort在苏格兰洛包爾德包结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1312年8月27日在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉拉 洛奇享年51岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼莫比韓瓦斯。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Arthur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin. King Arthur was a British king of the 5th or 6th century, about whom virtually no historical facts are known. He ruled in Britain after the collapse of the Roman Empire and before the coming of the Germanic tribes, and a vast body of legends grew up around him in the literatures of medieval Western Europe. His name is first found in the Latinized form Artorius; it is of obscure etymology. The spelling with -th- was popular among the gentry families of West Yorkshire in the late 1400s, even before Henry VII , who may have hoped to capitalize on the legend, gave the name to his son. It remained in regular use in some areas and its popularity exploded in the early 19th century, largely as a result of the fame of Arthur Wellesley ( 1769–1852 ), Duke of Wellington, the victor at the Battle of Waterloo and subsequently prime minister. Further influences were Tennyson's Idylls of the King ( 1859–85 ), and the widespread Victorian interest, especially among the Pre-Raphaelites, in things medieval in general and in Arthurian legend in particular.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne was born on 25 July 1261, in Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne, was 22 and his mother, Béatrice of England, was 19. He married Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort in May 1294, in Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died on 27 August 1312, in La Roche, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 51, and was buried in Vannes, Morbihan, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne est né le 25 juillet 1261, à Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Béatrice of England, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort en mai 1294, à Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 27 août 1312, à La Roche, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne am 25. Juli 1261 in Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne 22 und seine Mutter Béatrice of England 19. Er hat im Mai 1294 in Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 27. August 1312 im Alter von 51 Jahren in La Roche, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagneが1261年7月25日にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインレンスで生まれた時，父John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagneは22歳，母Béatrice of Englandは19歳であった。1294年5月にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアジェドブルグでYolande de Dreux Countess of Monfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1312年8月27日にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインラ ロチェで51歳で死去し，フランスブレタグンモービハンヴァンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne(이)가 1261년 7월 25일 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 렌스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrice of England(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1294년 5월 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 제드버그에서 Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1312년 8월 27일 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 라 록헤에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 버네스에 묻혔다.

pt.Champtoceaux, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la: Champtoceaux, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne nasceu em 25 de julho de 1261, em Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice of England, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort em maio de 1294, em Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de agosto de 1312, em La Roche, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne родился 25 июля 1261 г. в местности реннесь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени John II de Dreux Duc de Bretagne было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Béatrice of England, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort май 1294 г. в местности джедбург, роксбургшир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер 27 августа 1312 г. в местности ла рош, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности ваннесь, морбихань, бретагн, Франция.

Se casó con Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort en mayo de 1294, en Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió el 27 de agosto de 1312, en La Roche, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia.
